query_normalized: from chatbot to digital colleague: the paradigm shift toward persistent autonomous ai computer science
rationale: The paper addresses the "Digital Colleague" concept by proposing a framework for "Human-Agent Collaboration" and extending the "agents as remote collaborators" vision, which satisfies criterion (b) (variable on same domain) and (f) (cross-vocabulary alt-cluster), even though it focuses on a specific population (disability) allowed under criterion (a).
